title: rubus lacteus
intro: Rubus lacteus, also known as the milk white raspberry or the white raspberry, is a perennial plant species in the Rubus genus, characterized by its white or pale pink flowers and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lacteus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
